docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: SPANISH INTERPRETER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES R. BLANDING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JUAN CRUZ AND DIANA QUEZADA RAMIREZ ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. DEFENDANTS JUAN CRUZ AND DIANA QUEZADA RAMIREZ PAID THE PLAINTIFF JAMES R. BLANDING THE AMOUNT OF $10,000 IN COURT. THIS AMOUNT COVERS 9 MONTHS OF UNPAID RENT FROM 5/1/24 TO 1/1/2025. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES R. BLANDING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JUAN CRUZ AND DIANA QUEZADA RAMIREZ ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,367.13 FILED BY BLANDING, JAMES R. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, JUAN QUEZADA RAMIREZ, DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $25. SERVED JAN-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA RAMIREZ, DIANA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2025 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO APR-11-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES R. BLANDING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JUAN CRUZ AND DIANA QUEZADA RAMIREZ ARE BOTH PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
